document_api_meta.title: Get Video Performances
document_api_meta.env_desc: This is a US-creator-only API for now. And it is for  getting Tiktok E-commerce video metrics(incliding anchor_display_rate, ctr, orders, items_sold, gmv) to analysis.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: video_ids
request_query_param.desc: Collection of video IDs for retrieving the e-commerce metrics. Callers must ensure that all video IDs share the same author ID. Limit collection size 100. Use "," to separate array elements when send in the query.

request_query_param.name: start_time_ge
request_query_param.desc:
Start date for the metrics, set with a one-day delay from today due to latency in the data pipeline. The start_time parameter must be within the last 180 days from the current date. Only date value is processed, hour/mininute/second values will be ignored. 
For example, if the start_time value is: 1703507696 ("26-12-2023 04:34:56"), backend service will only consider the part "26-12-2023" when doing the query because by default, in offline data analytics, there is no hour/min/sec data level.

request_query_param.name: end_time_le
request_query_param.desc: End date for the metrics, set with a one-day delay from today due to latency in the data pipeline. Only date value is processed, hour/mininute/second values will be ignored.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^videos
response_param.desc: Contains a list of video objects. The inner list of objects will be organized in ascending order based on the video_id field.

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: Each video ID in the request parameter corresponds to array of daily metrics.

response_param.name: ^^performances
response_param.desc: The list of objects within will be arranged in ascending order based on the start_time field.

response_param.name: ^^^^anchor_display_rate
response_param.desc: Display rate for anchors, specified with two decimal numbers.

response_param.name: ^^^^click_through_rate
response_param.desc: Click through rate, specified with two decimal numbers.

response_param.name: ^^^^order_count
response_param.desc: Number of orders in this date.

response_param.name: ^^^^item_sold_count
response_param.desc: Number of sold items in this date.

response_param.name: ^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV value for this date, specified with two decimal numbers.

response_param.name: ^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: Currency of GMV value, three-letter code, ISO 4217

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You will be able to post shoppable content to the creator's TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against the creator's account or the content.
scope_list.auth_info: The developer will be able to post shoppable content to your TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against your account or the content.
